title: LEGERM【2-Pack】 Premium Cake Slice Set, Stainless Steel Smooth & Serrated Cake Slicer, Pizza & Dessert Cake Cutter | Dishwasher Safe | Right/Left Handed Friendly Kitchen Utensil (Black)
features: 【Ergonomic Design】Unique cake knife features a thickened, widened handle that reduce hand fatigue. It eliminates traditional single-handed limitations for a more intuitive baking experience.

【Food-Grade Material】Crafted from premium stainless steel, resists rust, corrosion, and bending—even in high-use kitchen environments. Its food-contact safety ensures peace of mind for both professional baking and daily cooking.
【Easy to Clean】Unlike cheaper alternatives, this professional-grade cake server is dishwasher safe for easy cleaning and built to last through years of frequent use.
【Perfect Size】The extended blade ensures effortless,while the widened spatula surface holds large portions with ease—optimized for both efficiency and convenience in home baking.
【Perfect Gift Choice】Beautifully packaged, this elegant stainless steel server makes an ideal gift for weddings or housewarmings. Durable construction ensures years of use and appreciation.
description: Product Description Premium Kitchen Essentials for Those Who Love to Cook This cake knife has a serrated stainless steel cutting edge, which slices through soft cake layers and crispy pie crusts like a dream. The smooth, flat edge can then be used to lift and serve. High Quality and Durable Material Not like other cheap cake server set with flimsy plastic handles that break and bend easily. cake server set make with a sturdy, ergonomical, classic design handle, comfortable to hold in hand. Full body stainless steel makes sure that durable and sturdy. The anti-slip handle of this cake spatulas gives you a comfortable operation,ergonomic design to help you spread the cake better. Looks and Feels good in all conditions, perfect for parties, wedding , events, Thanks for Giving, Chrismas, New Year Event. Perfect for home, hotel, restaurant, out door. Easy to clean and storage.
